system.flavor: With a clap, you deflect a blow with your bare hand or the flat edge of your blade.
system.effect:
Effect shield, and gain the following interrupt until the start of your next turn:
  [Turn Blades/Cut Bullets — Interrupt 1. Trigger foe's ability would deal damage to an adjacent ally. Effect ally halves incoming damage. You also take half the incoming damage. This damage is calculated before reductions.]
Effect you scored a critical hit or excelled this turn, this ability becomes quick.
